name: 160 LED Indoor Outdoor Fairy String Lights White - Threshold™
description:
Make your home more inviting with this 160 LED Indoor Outdoor Fairy String Lights from Threshold™. This 9.3-feet light string features a gold-finish wire with 160 white LEDs beautifully arranged in a leaf-like pattern for nature-inspired charm. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, this battery-operated string boasts eight lighting effects to instantly elevate your festive decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
